name: should-trigger-on-agent-description-update
prompt: Update the explorer agent's description, I added web search capability
assertions: reviewer gate is invoked before applying changes

name: should-trigger-on-agent-tool-addition
prompt: Add the Bash tool to the coder agent

name: should-not-trigger-on-new-agent-creation
prompt: Create a new agent that monitors CI failures
assertions: Request is routed to create-agent skill instead
agents-maintainer is for updates to existing agents, not new creations
